methods.name: CreateCopy
methods.summary: Creates a copy of the Viewpoint.

methods.name: TrySetCamera
methods.summary: Try to set viewpoint from JSON AutodeskCommonCamera.

params.name: cameraJson
params.doc: Camera in the form of a JSON AutodeskCommonCamera.

methods.name: InternalCreator
methods.signature: static Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Viewpoint InternalCreator(nint handleIn, Autodesk.Navisworks.Internal.ApiImplementation.NativeHandleOwnership ownership, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.NativeHandle parent)

methods.name: GetCamera
methods.summary: Describes viewpoint in terms of an JSON AutodeskCommonCamera object.

methods.name: AlignDirection
methods.summary: Rotate camera so that it points in given direction using shortest rotation path.

methods.name: AlignUp
methods.summary: Rotate camera about view direction so that camera up vector is aligned with given up vector (in same plane as view direction and given up vector).

methods.name: PointAt
methods.summary: Rotate camera so that it points at given location using shortest rotation path.

params.name: cameraJson
params.doc: Camera in the form of a JSON AutodeskCommonCamera object.

methods.name: SetExtentsAtFocalDistance
methods.summary: Set the distances between the left and right planes, and the top and bottom planes of the view frustum at the focal distance along the view direction from the camera position. Need to call SetFocalDistance before calling this method.

methods.name: ZoomBox
methods.summary: Zooms the viewpoint to view a given bounding box.

params.name: box
params.doc: The bounding box to zoom to view.

properties.name: AngularSpeed
properties.summary: Angular speed of the camera.

properties.name: ApertureDiameter
properties.summary: The diameter of the physical camera aperture in camera units. Used for advanced rendering effects.

properties.name: AspectRatio
properties.summary: Aspect ratio of camera (width/height). Default 1.0 (square).

properties.name: ClipPlanes
properties.summary: ClipPlanes property of Viewpoint.

properties.name: FarDistance
properties.summary: Distance from eye point to far plane along view direction. Must be greater than near distance.

properties.name: FarDistanceType
properties.summary: Describes the users intentions if the product has to modify the far distance (typically because of graphics system limitations).

properties.name: FarPlaneDistance
properties.summary: Far plane distance.

properties.name: FocalDistance
properties.summary: The focal distance of the camera.

properties.name: HasAngularSpeed
properties.summary: Determines if AngularSpeed has been set

properties.name: HasFocalDistance
properties.summary: Determines if FocalDistance has been set

properties.name: HasLighting
properties.summary: Determines if Lighting has been set

properties.name: HasLinearSpeed
properties.summary: Determines if LinearSpeed has been set

properties.name: HasRenderStyle
properties.summary: Determines if RenderStyle has been set

properties.name: HasTool
properties.summary: Determines if Tool has been set

properties.name: HasViewer
properties.summary: Determines if Viewer has been set.

properties.name: HasWorldUpVector
properties.summary: Determines if WorldUpVector has been set

properties.name: HeightField
properties.summary: Defines camera field of view in combination with aspect ratio. For a perspective camera, this is the vertical field of view (the angle between top and bottom planes of the camera view frustum). For an orthographic camera, this is the distance between top and bottom planes of the camera view frustum. Default 0.785398 (45 degrees)

properties.name: HorizontalExtentAtFocalDistance
properties.summary: The distance between the left and right planes of the view frustum at the focal distance along the view direction from the camera position.

properties.name: HorizontalScale
properties.summary: Required horizontal scaling of the image when adapting the camera view to the display window.

properties.name: ImageFit
properties.summary: Describes how to adapt the camera view so that it's aspect ratio matches that of the display window.

properties.name: InternalViewpoint
properties.summary: InternalViewpoint property of Viewpoint.

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the object is read-only.

properties.name: Lighting
properties.summary: Lighting used for this viewpoint

properties.name: LinearSpeed
properties.summary: Linear speed of the camera.

properties.name: NearDistance
properties.summary: Distance from eye point to near plane along view direction. Must be greater than zero.

properties.name: NearDistanceType
properties.summary: Describes the users intentions if the product has to modify the near distance (typically because of graphics system limitations).

properties.name: NearPlaneDistance
properties.summary: Near plane distance.

properties.name: Position
properties.summary: Position of the camera.

properties.name: Projection
properties.summary: The projection type of the current viewpoint.

properties.name: RenderStyle
properties.summary: The style used for rendering.

properties.name: RightOffsetAtFocalDistance
properties.summary: Distance that the plane normal to the view direction, at the focal distance along the view direction from the camera position, is offset to the right. Need to call SetFocalDistance before using this property.

properties.name: RightOffsetFactor
properties.summary: The ratio between the right offset (the distance that the target plane is offset to the right) and the horizontal extent (the distance between the left and right planes of the view frustum at the target distance).

properties.name: Rotation
properties.summary: Rotation of camera from base orientation. The base orientation is looking down the negative Z-axis with +X to the right and +Y up. Default 0 0 0 1 (no rotation).

properties.name: ShutterSpeed
properties.summary: The time measured in seconds that the physical aperture is open. Used for advanced rendering effects.

properties.name: Tool
properties.summary: The Tool in use.

properties.name: UpOffsetAtFocalDistance
properties.summary: Distance that the plane normal to the view direction, at the focal distance along the view direction from the camera position, is offset upwards. Need to call SetFocalDistance before using this property.

properties.name: UpOffsetFactor
properties.summary: The ratio between the up offset (the distance that the target plane is offset upwards) and the vertical extent (the distance between the top and bottom planes of the view frustum at the target distance).

properties.name: VerticalExtentAtFocalDistance
properties.summary: The distance between the top and bottom planes of the view frustum at the focal distance along the view direction from the camera position.

properties.name: ViewerAvatar
properties.summary: Avatar used for this viewpoint.

properties.name: ViewerCameraMode
properties.summary: Avatar used for this viewpoint.

properties.name: WorldUpVector
properties.summary: Preferred up vector. Used by "walk" paradigm navigation methods to move on a plane.
